INESSILENT-USE_INES_CARD_FRAME.title: Enable card frame
INESSILENT-USE_INES_CARD_FRAME.hover.des: Enable card frame recolor for Ines (Silent)
INESSILENT-USE_INES_ENERGY.title: Enable energy counter
INESSILENT-USE_INES_ENERGY.hover.desc: Enable energy counter recolor for Ines (Silent)
INESSILENT-USE_INES_MULT_ARM.title: Enable mutliplayer arm
INESSILENT-USE_INES_MULT_ARM.hover.desc: Enable custom multiplayer arm (rock/paper/scissor/point) for Ines (Silent)
INESSILENT-USE_WISADELE_POTION.title: Enable Wis'Adele April fools
INESSILENT-USE_WISADELE_POTION.hover.des: Change poison logo to Wis'Adele april fools skin
INESSILENT-RED_SHIV_COLOR.title: Enable red shiv
INESSILENT-RED_SHIV_COLOR.hover.desc: Change shiv color to red (because i thinks it's cool)
INESSILENT-DEBUG_MODE.title: Enable debug mode
INESSILENT-DEBUG_MODE.hover.desc: Enable debug mode that will print debug in logs, usually disable to prevent log flooding
